title: PolicyConfig
description: Safety and permission configuration evaluated before plan approval and at each execution step. Derived from UserAutomationPolicy (user-level) merged with org-level defaults. No component may bypass these rules.

user_id.description: Owner of this policy. Null means org-level default.

allowed_packages.description: Exhaustive allowlist of Android packages the executor may interact with. Any plan targeting a package not in this list is rejected immediately.

blocked_action_types.description: Action types the policy engine will unconditionally reject. MVP: empty for standard users, may block SWIPE for high-risk orgs.

always_confirm_action_types.description: Action types that always require a confirmation step, even if the plan author omitted requires_confirmation = true.

max_steps_per_plan.description: Hard cap on the number of steps in any single plan.

sensitive_screen_policy.description: 'abort' immediately terminates the session; 'pause' suspends and asks the user for manual takeover.

risk_threshold.description: Plans containing any step whose sensitivity exceeds this threshold are rejected.

allow_coordinates_fallback.description: If false (default), SWIPE steps and Selector.bounds are rejected. Enables raw-coordinate gestures only when explicitly granted.
